title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud Spanner now supports hybrid search combining full-text and vector search for AI-powered applications. The feature integrates with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to enable contextual search and retrieval-augmented generation workflows.
writeup: This video covers hybrid search in Google Cloud Spanner, which combines full-text and vector search to support AI-powered applications. The feature integrates with the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to drive contextual search and retrieval-augmented generation workflows. The takeaway: Spanner can now serve both keyword and semantic retrieval from a single database for RAG pipelines.
